title: feuilleea dysantha
side_effects: Feuilleea dysantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, digestive issues, and cardiovascular problems. Ingesting the plant's leaves or roots can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Long-term exposure to feuilleea dysantha's volatile oils may also lead to headaches, fatigue, and respiratory issues. Improper use of feuilleea dysantha can exacerbate existing health conditions, such as hypertension and kidney disease.
